name: Agpl.Generic_Limited_File_Store

access_types.name: Item_Access
access_types.code: type Item_Access is access all Item;

subprograms.name: Load
subprograms.code: procedure Load (This : out Item; File : in String)

documentation.description:
This uses Item'Read
In place to avoid extra copy at return.

subprograms.name: To_File
subprograms.code: procedure To_File (This : in Item; File : in String)

documentation.description:
This uses Item'Write
Write a file with the dumped item. Overwrites if existing.

formals.name: Read
formals.code:
procedure Read  (S : access Ada.Streams.Root_Stream_Type'Class;
                 I :    out Item)

formals.name: Write
formals.code:
procedure Write (S : access Ada.Streams.Root_Stream_Type'Class;
                 I :        Item)
